# @zakkster/lite-hud v2.0.0

Zero-GC SPP-native canvas overlay for the @zakkster profiler suite.
Single-file ESM (Hud.js). No runtime dependencies. MIT.

## Model

- **Sink.** `hud` is a duck-typed SPP sink: `{ write(packed, t, a, b) }`.
- **attach(scope).** Reads `scope.streams()` descriptors, builds LUT and per-channel Float64Array rings, calls `scope.addSink(hud_self)`.
- **write(packed, t, a, b).** Hot path. Decodes `sid = (packed/65536)|0`, `op = (packed - sid*65536)|0` using arithmetic (not bitwise, to avoid Int32 sign extension for sid >= 0x8000). Routes via `lut[sid][op & 0xFF]`.

## Protocol constants (inlined)

```
META_STREAM = 0     OP_EPOCH = 0x0F00   OP_CONT = 0x0F01
OP_VERDICT  = 0x0F40   OP_BUDGET_SET = 0x0F41
KIND_LEVEL=0  KIND_INSTANT=1  KIND_SPAN=2  KIND_COUNTER=3
```

## Ring layout

Stride = `3 * width` per record: `[t, a, b]` for width=1.
For CONT: `[t,a,b, c0,c1,c2]` (width=2) or `[t,a,b,c0,c1,c2,d0,d1,d2]` (width=3).
Capacity = `pow2(ceil(hz * windowSec) + 1)` for LEVEL, else 256.
Head advances in record units; bitmask = `cap - 1`.

## Paired SPAN layout

Ring record: `[t_open, t_close, correlId]`.
Open pool: `Map<correlId, t_open>` per paired channel.

## Complete SPAN layout (D5)

Ring record: `[t_start, duration_ms, 0]`.
Manual `push(durationMs)` synthesizes: `write(packed, now - dur, dur, 0)`.

## BUDGET_SET (0x0F41)

`a = interned_channel_name_id`, `b = threshold_value`.
HUD resolves via `scope.label(a|0)` -> channel name match.
DI alternative: `hud.attach(scope, { budgets: [{channel, threshold, label?}] })`.

## Manual channels (D4)

`hud.channel({ name?, unit?, hz?, kind? })` -> `{ push(v) }`.
Synthetic stream IDs start at `0x8000` (arithmetic packed: `sid*65536 + opLow`).
`push()` calls `write()` directly. One rendering truth.

## API

```js
import { createHud, VERSION } from '@zakkster/lite-hud';
const hud = createHud(mountEl, { windowSec, position, hotkey, zIndex });
hud.attach(scope, { budgets? });  // scope-driven channels
const fps = hud.channel({ name: 'fps', kind: 0 }); fps.push(60); // manual
hud.write(packed, t, a, b);       // direct SPP sink
hud.stats();                      // { drops, channels, epoch, verdicts, budgets, channelStats }
hud.inspect(name);                // { count, last: {t, a, b} } | null (cold path)
hud.render();                     // draw at ~10-15Hz
hud.show(); hud.hide(); hud.destroy();
hud.visible; // getter
```

## Attach-time validation

- Throws on `op.code & 0xFF` collision within a single stream (SPP invariant).
  Cross-stream reuse of the same low byte is fine.
- CONT slots buffer is `Float64Array(3 * maxWidth)` per stream; any width
  supported. Buffer grows if a later op needs more slots.

## Conventions

- ASCII-only source. No console.log/debugger in shipped code.
- `node:test` suite (59 tests). Run: `node --test test/Hud.test.js` or `npm test`.
- sideEffects: false. MIT. Copyright Zahary Shinikchiev.
